name: text-to-cad-coach
description: Refines rough physical-part ideas into measurable, printable requirements and implementation prompts for text-to-CAD workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough ideas into CAD-ready requirements.
interface.longDescription: A guided requirements coach for parametric and 3D-printable CAD parts. It asks focused questions, tracks uncertain dimensions, checks fit and printability, and produces a self-contained implementation prompt.
defaultPrompt: Help me refine an idea into a CAD-ready specification.
Design a Duplo-compatible part with me.
Review my CAD prompt for missing requirements.
